headlines.title: Nigeria's Crude Oil Production Hits 15-Month High
headlines.summary: Nigeria’s crude oil output jumped to a 15-month high in May as Africa’s top producer continues to ramp up production, data from the Nigerian Upstream Petroleum Regulatory Commission (NUPRC) showed.
